review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI re-review verified packet self-omission was fixed, C00 design brief scope inventory remains bound to RP00.P00.M09.S01, M08.S02 remains production_ready, metadata-only/no-real-data/no-write and non-replacement boundaries hold, and the remaining generalized parity check is correctly deferred to RP00.P00.M09.S02.

findings.title: Generalized strict evidence-field parity enforcement appropriately deferred to M09.S02
findings.details: The concrete packet files_for_review inconsistency was fixed by adding packet.json itself. Generalized parity enforcement between packet.files_for_review and contract.required_evidence_inputs is acceptance-gate logic and belongs in RP00.P00.M09.S02.
findings.recommendation: Defer the generalized parity check to RP00.P00.M09.S02 acceptance-gate definition.

parsed_review.review_notes: Initial actual Claude CLI review returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with two P3 notes. The packet self-omission P3 was fixed before final re-review. Final actual Claude CLI re-review returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with one non-blocking P3 explicitly deferred to RP00.P00.M09.S02.
